mapper.select: SELECT id, rule_id, priority_order, series_names, is_price_fallback, remark FROM series_priority_rule_item WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId} ORDER BY priority_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO series_priority_rule_item (rule_id, priority_order, series_names, is_price_fallback, remark) VALUES (#{ruleId}, #{priorityOrder}, #{seriesNames}, #{isPriceFallback}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE series_priority_rule_item SET priority_order = #{priorityOrder}, series_names = #{seriesNames}, is_price_fallback = #{isPriceFallback}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
